title: Policies — Feedback
text:
Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
Items on this page refer to third party products or projects that provide functionality required by Kubernetes. The Kubernetes project authors aren't responsible for those third-party products or projects. See the
CNCF website guidelines
for more details.
You should read the
content guide
before proposing a change that adds an extra third-party link.
